# Aldo Leopold

*1887 – 1948 · American · [Environmental Ethics](../movements/environmental-ethics.md)*

American ecologist and forester: his "land ethic" widens the moral community to the land itself, soils, waters, plants, and animals, an action being right when it preserves the integrity, stability, and beauty of the biotic community.

> Stub profile: only this mini-card exists so far; the sourced axis positions remain to be authored. Contributions welcome.
